stories.title: समय पर जानकारी, वकालत और पैरोकारी से गरीब परिवारों को लाखों की राहत
stories.titleEn: Timely Information & Advocacy: ₹6 Lakh Relief for 70 Families
stories.summary: Through AAS collective action, 70 Tharu tribal families in Fakirpuri got ₹6 Lakh in wrongful electricity bills waived after community coordinator Sama Kausar organized meetings with the electricity department.
stories.impact: ₹600,000 in wrongful bills waived for 70 families through collective advocacy (April 2026)
stories.sourceFile: Case Study समय पर जानकारी, वकालत और पैरोकारी से गरीब परिवारों को लाखों की राहत.docx

stories.title: सही जगह पर पैरवी करने से अंशु को मिला न्याय
stories.titleEn: Rightful Advocacy: Anshu Kumari Wins Justice
stories.summary: Anshu Kumari, a young widow from the Tharu community, obtained government scheme benefits through DEHAT-facilitated advocacy and court guidance, breaking barriers of social discrimination.
stories.impact: Widow entitlements secured through structured advocacy
stories.sourceFile: Case Study सही जगह पर पैरवी करने से अंशु को मिला न्याय.docx

stories.title: युवा किसान अनिरुद्ध कुमार: वैज्ञानिक एवं जैविक खेती से आत्मनिर्भरता
stories.titleEn: Young Farmer Anirudh Kumar: Scientific Organic Farming to Self-Reliance
stories.summary: Anirudh Kumar (age ~40) transformed from traditional paddy-wheat on 1.2 acres to diverse organic vegetables and spices. He doubled his land to 2.4 acres, built a pucca house, and sends his children to English-medium school.
stories.impact: Land doubled from 1.2 to 2.4 acres, built pucca house, children in English-medium school

stories.title: मैं रामचंद्र: मल्टी-लेयर फार्मिंग से आय वृद्धि
stories.titleEn: Ram Chandra: Income Growth Through Multi-Layer Farming
stories.summary: Ram Chandra's family of 18 members switched from wage labour to multi-layer farming — bitter gourd on trellis above onion beds. Earned ₹35,000 from 10 biswa, purchased a motorcycle and sends grandchildren to school.
stories.impact: ₹35,000 income from 10 biswa, purchased motorcycle, children enrolled in school

stories.title: कल्लू: परंपरागत खेती से सब्जी उत्पादन की ओर
stories.titleEn: Kallu ji: From Traditional to Vegetable Farming
stories.summary: Kallu ji switched from labour-intensive paddy-wheat with low savings to cauliflower cultivation with DEHAT support, earning ₹17,500 from 10 biswa at minimal cost.
stories.impact: ₹17,500 from cauliflower on 10 biswa vs traditional paddy-wheat with low savings

stories.title: कलावती जी: विधवा संघर्ष और सामुदायिक सहारा
stories.titleEn: Kalawati: Widow's Struggle and Community Support
stories.summary: Kalawati, widowed after her husband died from alcohol-related illness, struggles with 0.4 acres of land, wild animal crop destruction, and raising her children alone in Karikot GP.
stories.impact: Surviving on 0.4 acres with wild animal crop loss — needs livelihood support

stories.title: आरती जी: ज्वाला आजीविका अधिकार संगठन की प्रेरणादायक नेता
stories.titleEn: Arti ji: Inspiring Leader of Jwala Aajeevika Adhikar Sangathan
stories.summary: Arti ji emerged as a community leader through AAS, advocating for sanitation (toilets), organic farming adoption, and collective action for entitlements in Karikot GP.
stories.impact: Community-level sanitation and organic farming adoption facilitated through AAS leadership

stories.title: राजकुमारी देवी: संघर्ष से सफलता तक — महिला किसान की कहानी
stories.titleEn: Rajkumari Devi: From Struggle to Success — A Woman Farmer's Story
stories.summary: Rajkumari Devi transformed her farm through turmeric and vegetable intercropping, achieving substantial income increase and becoming a role model for women farmers.
stories.impact: Substantial income increase through turmeric intercropping, became community role model

stories.title: रीना कुमारी: शिक्षा और आत्मनिर्भरता की कहानी
stories.titleEn: Reena Kumari: Education and Self-Reliance
stories.summary: Reena Kumari's story of pursuing education and self-reliance despite economic constraints, with support from community organizations.
stories.impact: Pursuing education and self-reliance against economic odds

stories.title: गंगिया देवी: सामुदायिक कार्रवाई से सशक्तिकरण
stories.titleEn: Gangiya Devi: Empowerment Through Collective Action
stories.summary: Gangiya Devi's journey from passive beneficiary to active community advocate, participating in AAS-led collective actions for women's rights and organic farming.
stories.impact: Transitioned from passive beneficiary to active community organizer

stories.title: शराब का शिकार: बिन्दु देवी का परिवार
stories.titleEn: Victim of Alcohol: Bindu Devi's Family Story
stories.summary: Bindu Devi (28), widowed after her husband died from alcohol abuse, struggles with 0.4 acres of land, wildlife crop destruction, and MNREGA corruption (paid ₹150 for job card, zero work days). She applied for DEHAT fellowship to fight social evils.
stories.impact: 0.4 acres with alcohol epidemic context; paid bribes for MNREGA card with zero employment
stories.sourceFile: शराब का शिकार  बिन्दु देवी का परिवार.docx

stories.title: सुदामा देवी की दर्द भरी कहानी
stories.titleEn: Sudama Devi's Heartbreaking Story
stories.summary: Sudama Devi (57), a widow in Bhattha Bargadaha's forest-fringe village, was cheated ₹600 by the village head for MNREGA job cards (no work ever given). Her husband died untreated. Her son works as a contract labourer in Kannauj. No toilet, leaking thatch roof, and a 2-km walk for health/education.
stories.impact: Lost ₹600 to bribes for fake job cards; untreated husband died; family in extreme multidimensional poverty
stories.sourceFile: सुदामा देवी की दर्द भरी कहानी.docx

stories.title: मेरा नाम कुमारी कविता है
stories.titleEn: My name is Kumari Kavita
stories.summary: Kavita's personal narrative of seeking education and opportunity despite being a young woman from a marginalized community.
stories.impact: Personal journey of educational aspiration against socio-economic barriers

stories.title: मेरा नाम कुमारी चाँदनी है
stories.titleEn: My name is Kumari Chandani
stories.summary: Chandani's story of navigating adolescence and educational aspirations in a resource-constrained tribal village.
stories.impact: Young woman's educational journey in Fakirpuri

stories.title: सुनील कुमार: कृषि में नवाचार
stories.titleEn: Sunil Kumar: Innovation in Agriculture
stories.summary: Sunil Kumar from Rajaram Tanda shares his experience adopting improved agricultural practices through DEHAT training.
stories.impact: Adopted improved practices through DEHAT training

stories.title: सशक्त नारी: मंजू देवी की कहानी
stories.titleEn: Empowered Woman: Manju Devi's Story
stories.summary: Manju Devi's journey from domestic constraints to community leadership and economic independence through SHG and DEHAT engagement.
stories.impact: Community leadership and economic independence achieved through SHG participation

stories.title: कोटेदार की बर्खास्तगी: सामुदायिक पैरोकारी की जीत
stories.titleEn: Fair-Price Shop Dealer Dismissed: A Community Advocacy Victory
stories.summary: Community mobilization led to the dismissal of a corrupt fair-price shop dealer who was denying ration to entitled families in Fakirpuri.
stories.impact: Corrupt PDS dealer dismissed through community advocacy

stories.title: गीता देवी: प्याज और करेला की मिश्रित खेती से दोहरा लाभ
stories.titleEn: Geeta Devi: Double Benefit from Onion and Bitter Gourd Mixed Farming
stories.summary: Geeta Devi cultivated onion (4 quintals, ₹7,200 income) and bitter gourd (3 quintals, ₹3,500 income) on 5 biswa each using organic methods with DEHAT seed support, earning ₹6,850 net profit.
stories.impact: ₹6,850 net profit from mixed organic vegetable cultivation on 10 biswa total
stories.sourceFile: Factsheet of Onion and bitter guard,Geeta devi.docx

stories.title: कौशल्या: हल्दी की खेती से चार गुणा लाभ
stories.titleEn: Kaushalya: Four Times More Profit from Turmeric
stories.summary: Kaushalya cultivated desi Sugandha turmeric on 0.8 acres, producing 90 quintals with ₹1,71,000 income and ₹92,500 net profit. She confirms turmeric gives 3-4x more profit than paddy-wheat.
stories.impact: ₹92,500 net profit from 0.8 acre turmeric — 3-4x more than paddy-wheat

stories.title: द्वारिका प्रसाद: पत्ता गोभी की फसल से उच्च लाभ
stories.titleEn: Dwarika Prasad: High Returns from Cabbage
stories.summary: Dwarka Prasad cultivated Swadeshi Champion cabbage on 0.2 acres with solar pump irrigation and organic methods, producing 20 quintals with ₹48,000 income and ₹39,200 net profit.
stories.impact: ₹39,200 net profit from 0.2 acre cabbage — excellent small-plot returns
stories.sourceFile: द्वारिका प्रसाद जी की फैक्ट शीट.docx
